summary: Good‑quality audience tape captures an energetic show highlighted by a Terrapin Station opener and Dark Star teases.
review: The recording, sourced from the crowd and praised for its solid fidelity thanks to Charlie Miller, delivers a lively performance with plenty of energy. Reviewers point out a strong second set that opens with Terrapin Station and note intriguing Dark Star teases that make the show worth acquiring.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers rate 4‑5 stars, describe an energetic performance with standout moments, and note a good‑quality audience recording; the consensus is clearly positive.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape recorded by Charlie Miller; generally clear with typical crowd ambience but no major dropouts or muffling.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic throughout, with a cool second‑set opener featuring Terrapin Station and several Dark Star teases that keep the momentum high.
